legislation.title: Housing Affordability Act of 2025
legislation.full_text: An act to add Section 65852.5 to the Government Code, relating to housing.

impacts.description: Increases housing supply by streamlining approval for multifamily developments near transit
impacts.chain_of_causality: Bill removes CEQA review for qualifying projects -> faster approvals -> increased supply -> downward pressure on rents

impacts.description: Reduces permitting costs for affordable housing developments
impacts.chain_of_causality: Waives impact fees for projects with 20%+ affordable units -> lower development cost -> more affordable units built

legislation.title: Small Business Tax Relief Act
legislation.full_text: An act to amend Sections 17001 and 23101 of the Revenue and Taxation Code.

impacts.description: Provides tax credits for small businesses with fewer than 50 employees
impacts.chain_of_causality: Tax credit reduces operating costs -> small businesses retain more revenue -> local economic stimulus

legislation.title: Climate Resilience Infrastructure Bond
legislation.full_text: An act to authorize the issuance of bonds for climate resilience infrastructure projects.
